channel.title: LIBRCHAIN 区块链新闻雷达
channel.description: 每小时自动更新的区块链新闻、博客与 X 热点聚合

item.title: Here’s what happened in crypto today
item.description: Need to know what happened in crypto today? Here is the latest news on daily trends and events impacting Bitcoin price, blockchain, DeFi, NFTs, Web3 and crypto regulation.

item.title: Trump Urges Congress to Move on Crypto Rules Amid Banking Clash
item.description: The dispute centers on whether crypto firms should be allowed to offer stablecoin yield, an issue that has stalled key negotiations.

item.title: What's at stake for crypto as 3 US states kick off party primaries?
item.description: Super PACs backed by the crypto industry are expected to spend millions of dollars in the 2026 midterm elections after many of their chosen candidates won in 2024.

item.title: Locals prefer satoshis to dollars, says Africa Bitcoin chair Stafford Masie
item.description: In an interview with Natalie Brunell on Coin Stories, Masie described Bitcoin as functional currency in parts of Africa amid rapid inflation and currency debasement.

item.title: Trump urges passage of U.S. Clarity Act, attacks banks for 'undercutting' GENIUS
item.description: U.S. President Donald Trump said in a post on Truth Social that the banking industry is trying to undermine the stablecoin bill he signed into law last year.

item.title: South Koreans Paid in Crypto for 'Revenge' Attacks Involving Human Waste, Say Police: Report
item.description: Police in South Korea have arrested people in a "revenge" group that were paid in crypto to make threats and vandalize property, per a local report.

item.title: CFTC chair teases crypto perpetual futures in ‘the next month or so‘
item.description: SEC Chair Paul Atkins and CFTC Chair Michael Selig addressed market structure, prediction markets and perpetual futures at a Tuesday event.

item.title: MARA exec pushes back on Bitcoin treasury sell-off narrative
item.description: MARA has "fact checked" claims it adopted a Bitcoin sell-off strategy, clarifying its filing allows flexible sales but does not signal a majority liquidation.

item.title: JP Morgan CEO Jamie Dimon says stablecoin issuers paying interest should be regulated as banks
item.description: Dimon argued stablecoin issuers paying interest should meet bank standards as talks continue in Washington about the CLARITY Act.

item.title: BitGo expands MiCA-compliant crypto-as-a-service across EEA
item.description: The rollout enables banks and fintechs in 30 European markets to embed licensed custody, payments on- and off-ramps and trading through API-based infrastructure.

item.title: US Dollar Index nears 3-month high: Is this good or bad for Bitcoin?
item.description: US Dollar Index strength, fear that BTC miners may liquidate their reserves and Bitcoin’s performance compared to stocks raise concerns among investors.

item.title: 'More Accurate, Less Cringe': OpenAI Rolls Out GPT-5.3 Instant in ChatGPT
item.description: OpenAI's latest ChatGPT update targets tone and accuracy, aiming to make everyday AI conversations smoother and more useful.

item.title: Moderator: “You also need to figure out crypto.” Chairman of @FinancialCmte @RepFrenchHill: “Well, I have figured it out!” Hill, at the @MilkenInstitute Future of Finance event, said that if the Senate can’t reach a straightforward conclusion on the stablecoin yi - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFB3WENwdXR2ZjZ5Uk0yb2tyajNQT2FzMG90clM2ZmZNVlpJRkFOb3BzbzczNERUQ0E4UzZwcGVlZDM1aEV1ZVVJV3RqbFFMUFhzSlRoZVU3SkkxQmx0ZGNQdFNVTWZpZw?oc=5" target="_blank">Moderator: “You also need to…

item.title: Ripple expands stablecoin payments stack for banks, fintechs
item.description: The upgrade integrates custody, treasury automation and settlement tools as Ripple pushes deeper into institutional cross-border payments.

item.title: Donald Trump's crypto legacy in two words: Paul Atkins
item.description: As the CLARITY Act faces a stalemate on Capitol Hill, the Trump administration is pivoting toward executive workarounds and family-backed stablecoins to reshape the financial system without waiting for a vote, argues Dale.

item.title: Bitcoin Climbs, Stocks and Gold Drop as Iran Conflict Stokes Uncertainty
item.description: Bitcoin outpaced major U.S. stock indexes on Tuesday, rising as investors weighed the prospect of broader military conflict in Iran.

item.title: Over the past year, many people I talk to have expressed worry about two topics: * Various aspects of the way the world is going: government control and surveillance, wars, corporate power and surveillance, tech enshittification / corposlop, social media beco - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZkFVX3lxTFB6RVA2LU9YVTFORE0tbHRHamtkcEc4WXEzbEZ1THhSdUhJUjhYQnlzOEh1NGxjcllyVWJfVWFDM0E0UnRLMElYazRPandrRTJ0RTFFd1R5enFtc09PcjV4cEN3NlZ3UQ?oc=5" target="_blank">Over the past year, many peo…

item.title: Ether supply on exchanges drops to multi-year lows: Here’s why it matters
item.description: Ether reserves held on exchanges fell to a new multi-year low as ETH price struggles to trade above $2,000. Will the supply crunch benefit bulls or bears?

item.title: Ex-LAPD Officer Found Guilty of $350K ‘Wrench Attack’ Bitcoin Robbery
item.description: Eric Halem faces life in prison on kidnapping and robbery charges after stealing $350,000 in crypto from a teenager during a home invasion.

item.title: Mastercard adds SoFiUSD as settlement option for card issuers
item.description: SoFi will enable Mastercard issuers to settle card transactions in its cash-backed SoFiUSD stablecoin across the global payments network.

item.title: International finance watchdog warns stablecoins are increasingly used in sanctions evasion and money laundering
item.description: In its latest report, the global standard setter FATF said stablecoins now account for the bulk of illicit crypto activity and pose growing risks through peer-to-peer transfers.

item.title: Circle shares boosted by Middle East tensions, rising oil, fading rate cut hopes, says Mizuho
item.description: The stock has risen about 20% since the U.S. strikes on Iran over the weekend.

item.title: Core Scientific May Sell 'All' Bitcoin to Finance AI Pivot
item.description: Core Scientific unveiled plans to reduce its Bitcoin holdings significantly as its data center buildout continues ramping up.

item.title: AI agents will be primary users of blockchain, NEAR co-founder says
item.description: Polosukhin argues that AI will become the primary interface layer for everything online, including crypto, abstracting away wallets, explorers and transaction hashes.

item.title: Aave governance rift deepens as major governance group exits $26 billion DeFi protocol
item.description: The conflict centered on a proposal to fund product development and expansion, which ACI opposed due to concerns over self-voting and lack of transparency.

item.title: Eric Trump’s American Bitcoin buys 11,298 ASIC miners, increasing mining capacity by 12%
item.description: The move stands in stark contrast to the company's peers, many of whom are moving away from or totally abandoning the business of bitcoin mining.

item.title: Why Bermuda is testing a fully onchain economy instead of crypto mandates
item.description: Bermuda’s onchain economy plan prioritizes pilots, stablecoins and regulation over forced crypto adoption. Here’s why testing comes first.

item.title: Bank of Japan expands blockchain settlement sandbox and says CBDC efforts are ongoing
item.description: The BOJ is testing blockchain settlement for reserves and exploring tokenized central bank money as it prepares to decide in 2026 whether to issue a retail digital yen.

item.title: Mining companies move deeper into AI, HPC as MARA may sell Bitcoin
item.description: In a Monday SEC filing, the US Bitcoin miner said it would consider selling some of the coins on its balance sheet, depending on market conditions.

item.title: Bitcoin Miner MARA Says It May Sell BTC Holdings in Strategy Shift
item.description: Publicly traded Bitcoin miner MARA Holdings may sell more of its BTC as part of a strategy shift, the firm said in a new SEC filing.

item.title: American Bitcoin boosts hashrate with 11,298 new mining machines
item.description: The Eric Trump-led company adds 3 EH/s in new capacity, expanding its Alberta mining fleet as it deepens exposure to BTC amid volatile market conditions.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇵🇾 Paraguay's National Electricity Administration signs memorandum to "explore the role of Bitcoin mining as a national level opportunity." They will use Bitcoin miners to transform unused electricity into "a new revenue engine for Paraguay." 🚀 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1aZzFBRVVaNzZZbGxkT0trcFVTbWJtS1BpTkJINnVQTTFFbGRJeDFkc0lPVWFlQzhWOW95X2NpNmJRUE5oLTkwV2k3WFRiVmhxSm5ycTlRN1l5VnBabmxRQUhjZDgxYlk?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇵🇾 Paraguay's Na…

item.title: Bitcoin attempting to make a stand as global stock markets melt down on Iran war
item.description: Having already plunged in the months leading up to the Middle East conflict, crypto markets so far aren't making new lows this week.

item.title: JPMorgan CEO Jamie Dimon Slams Stablecoin Yield Demands: 'The Public Will Pay'
item.description: Jamie Dimon said if crypto companies like Coinbase want to offer stablecoin rewards, then they should become banks. “Then you can do whatever you want,” he said.

item.title: Bitcoin dives 3% on global asset rout as $5K gold 'smashed' on oil fears
item.description: Bitcoin bulls gave up their latest mission to reclaim $70,000 as Iran escalation sparked oil supply fears that gripped stocks and gold.

item.title: End of bitcoin 'HODL': public miners going all-in on AI, signaling more BTC selling
item.description: Public bitcoin miner balance sheets are shifting as capital rotates from bitcoin treasuries to AI infrastructure.

item.title: CFTC chief Selig to clear path for U.S. perpetual futures in coming weeks
item.description: The Commodity Futures Trading Commission chairman, appearing beside his Securities and Exchange Commission counterpart, said several crypto policies are coming.

item.title: In crypto, visibility is KING. Attention is the asset. Today we’re launching CMC Max. Designed to elevate your presence where attention already lives. 1/5 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTE1UZUNaajdISVp2UXNrU3dTM2w3NzUwUklETnY4TjM5V1B5SmpsOHAtajlqZ0JQUEFOVUQzZlcwaXRNUVRqSGNqWG9RVGk2c0lEWi1WSlU3WjNjbzdFb3l3Z0NyaWU?oc=5" target="_blank">In crypto, visibility is KING. …

item.title: Here is why Harvard trimmed bitcoin and bought ether and why the move is bullish for crypto
item.description: Volatility and private equity cash needs, not a market bet, may explain the endowment’s crypto shift, experts say.

item.title: Trump Brothers' American Bitcoin Boosts Mining Capacity Following Q4 Loss
item.description: American Bitcoin stock is down Tuesday after the firm said it purchased 11,298 new BTC miners to expand its fleet.

item.title: JUST IN: 🇮🇷 Iranians are buying Bitcoin and mass withdrawing it into self-custody amid the war. Bitcoin is the flight to safety 🙌 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE9TUldDNXIxc3gtb0JzNEFEOGpWM2dZSjFTTk8tOXNKTE5jWkxVY2NHcUR5QjJtN0E3X29uRjV6bF9rSjdfcjFpZkZuVkpaOVBKeGdLV3FCX2lCMTZCV1JFTEZaR2hSSW8?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: 🇮🇷 Iranians are …

item.title: 🚨 $1,000,000,000,000 has been wiped out from stocks since the US market opened. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiX0FVX3lxTE1TZFJqTXB4NnVOV0R6aWdDa2JCa1ZkWERWNGIxTEc4U2pxdFFLb01IeUpJc3dyVXR4U3RRRjhkcWNKc3ZvMG1ORVVPcVdFQTktNFdBZk9jMUc1NXVTQlp3?oc=5" target="_blank">🚨 $1,000,000,000,000 has been wiped o…

item.title: Google Nano Banana 2 vs ByteDance Seedream 5.0 Lite: Which AI Image Generator Is Best?
item.description: A hands-on comparison between Google's Nano Banana 2 and ByteDance's Seedream 5.0 shows how the latest image models differ on price, speed, and creative control.

item.title: CoinDesk 20 performance update: AAVE plunges 10%, leading index lower
item.description: Cardano (ADA), down 5.9% from Monday, joined Aave (AAVE) as an underperformer.

item.title: Visa and Stripe’s Bridge plan stablecoin card expansion to over 100 countries
item.description: Visa and Stripe-owned Bridge aim to expand stablecoin-linked Visa cards to 18 countries, and plan 100-plus by the end of the year, while testing stablecoin settlement with Lead Bank.

item.title: Ondo Finance tokenized stocks platform on Binance wins regulatory approval in Abu Dhabi
item.description: The regulatory nod will let UAE-based financial institutions deal in tokenized equities on Binance's regulated trading venue.

item.title: Strive strategist says AI deflation could push Bitcoin to $11M by 2036
item.description: Strive’s Joe Burnett argues AI-driven deflation may force looser policy, pushing Bitcoin toward $11 million a coin by 2036 and a $230 trillion market cap.

item.title: 🔥 BIG: SWIFT partners with BNY Mellon to design a blockchain-based ledger for cross-border payments and tokenized assets. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZEFVX3lxTFBGMGl6TmRjR2VZTk05TktRbThHZlFlTUVZT0JDNXFGaGpndzNjRFlTdjZiMzllb0c1ci1pcllua2dqcVVGSVZWYUpxeUltOVRqaUF2SmQ0YWFqRkNRTFd1R2pIS1k?oc=5" target="_blank">🔥 BIG: SWIFT partners with BNY…

item.title: Ether price again rejected at $2K: How low can ETH go in March?
item.description: Ether needed to hold a key support recently established at $1,800, coinciding with the lower trend line of a classic chart pattern that warns of a drop below $1,500.

item.title: Visa and Bridge plan stablecoin-linked card expansion to over 100 countries
item.description: Bridge has partnered with Lead Bank, a participant in Visa’s stablecoin settlement pilot, to help businesses and fintechs offer stablecoin-backed Visa cards.

item.title: Iranian Exchange Outflows Spiked to $10.3M Amid Airstrikes: Chainalysis
item.description: Some $10.3 million left Iranian exchanges in the days after joint US-Israeli strikes, with hourly volumes approaching $2 million at the peak.

item.title: Aave Chan Initiative to exit Aave DAO after governance clash over funding
item.description: The move follows a 52.58% Snapshot vote on a $42.5 million funding package for Aave Labs, now headed to the ARFC stage before any binding onchain decision.

item.title: Morning Minute: The Banks Are Coming for Crypto Custody
item.description: It's no longer a matter of if major banks will custody crypto but a matter of when, with Morgan Stanley, Citigroup and Barclays all lining up.

item.title: Bitcoin could slide further on liquidity squeeze, but long-term bull case intact: Sygnum CIO
item.description: Fabian Dori says a short-term liquidity squeeze is driving crypto’s slump, with further downside possible, though improving macro data and fundamentals could speed a recovery.

item.title: Boomers to the rescue again as bitcoin ETFs record $1.5b of inflows in the past 5 days after another big day yesterday. Biggest haul in a while, just about all of the original ten spot ETFs seeing action too = breadth and depth. This after a 50%(!) drawdown and - x.com

item.title: JUST IN: Eric Trump's "American Bitcoin" purchased 11,298 more BTC miners to help "protect the network and lead the future of Bitcoin in America." 🇺🇸 - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiZ0FVX3lxTE1JMjRLS0tyU1M2WnJNZXp1M28tcXRPRnRqTDZibFFQdS1OYWZGNEJCQ01tRlFMc3FkTFRNMFBBNHhLX0syUmU5cGtGVVgxdTRoZnlXOHRpaGwzYzVNdUhLbEstNVgxRUE?oc=5" target="_blank">JUST IN: Eric Trump's "Amer…

item.title: 💥BREAKING: Iran's new Defence Minister assassinated. 24hours after taking over the role from his predecessor who was also assassinated. - x.com
item.description: <a href="https://news.google.com/rss/articles/CBMiYkFVX3lxTE5FZDVBdGstMjVFaUIwd3Y1WUJMbVVxZjZ6R0lFOVpjd1JneE02b2NPcFJ1bUpxbV9oNEt6YkU3TkZvZHZ3WU9iM01fa3ZMZWlCVFhRLUJnckE0RGJVZFBibXlR?oc=5" target="_blank">💥BREAKING: Iran's new Defence Min…

item.title: Deloitte signs off on Anchorage reserve report for Tether’s USAT stablecoin
item.description: Big Four firm Deloitte attested to $17.6 million in reserves backing USAt, Tether’s new US-regulated stablecoin issued by Anchorage Digital Bank.

item.title: Bybit claims new fraud system stopped $300M of risky withdrawals in Q4 2025
item.description: Bybit says most of the $300 million “saved” came from users backing out after real-time warnings, highlighting how exchanges are shifting from recovery to preemptive fraud stops.

item.title: Oil shock and inflation fears drag down bitcoin
item.description: Your day-ahead look for March 3, 2026
